title: Atlanta Disco Society
location: The Garden Club at Wild Heaven West End, 1010 White St SW, Atlanta
description: The 17th semi-annual disco dance party at Atlanta's newest hot spot on the Beltline's Lee + White corridor. Kimber spins late-70s disco into nu-disco all night on Atlanta's largest light-up dance floor. Red carpet, photo booth by Hellacurious, and free on-site parking. Perfect for a glam date night — dress up, bring your partner or friend, and dance till 3AM. 21+ only.

title: Illumine 2026 at Oakland Cemetery
location: Historic Oakland Cemetery, 248 Oakland Ave SE, Atlanta
description: The 19th annual illuminated art experience transforms Atlanta's historic Oakland Cemetery into a nighttime wonderland of colorful light installations and art by local innovators. Stroll hand-in-hand through beautifully lit pathways. Self-guided evening experience — one of Atlanta's most romantic and unique date ideas. Runs through April 26.

title: No Tables, No Chairs Festival
location: Westside Park (Meadow), 1660 Johnson Rd NW, Atlanta
description: Mausiki Scales & the Common Ground Collective's iconic funk-filled celebration of African Diaspora culture. Sunday afternoon at Westside Park with a parade tailgate (DJ Ear Dr., face painting, costume crafting), performances by Atlanta All-Stars students, a Funk-line parade, Frankie’s Blues Mission, and Mausiki Scales & the Common Ground Collective closing concert. FREE, family-friendly, outdoors. Sunday FUNDay date idea.

title: Die Laughing Comedy Show
description: Stand-up comedy headlined by Nathan Loe, Justin Lawson and Khalid Elchoufi at Roaring Social's intimate social club. Drinks, limited food menu, and great laughs. Alpharetta location — combine with dinner nearby for a full evening. Great low-key date for couples who love humor.

title: Earth Day Celebration at Ponce City Market
description: Free community Earth Day event at Ponce City Market celebrating sustainability with local eco-organizations, hands-on activities, and environmental education. Stroll the market, grab food from one of PCM's great vendors, and learn together. Low-key, free, and feel-good — perfect for a laid-back Saturday daytime date.

title: Florence + The Machine - Everybody Scream Tour
location: State Farm Arena, 191 Peachtree St NE, Atlanta
description: Florence Welch and her band bring the Everybody Scream North American Tour to State Farm Arena. A breathtaking live spectacle — soaring vocals, theatrical staging, and anthems like 'Dog Days Are Over' and 'Kiss with a Fist.' Make it a special occasion: dress up, grab dinner downtown before, and soak in one of the most powerful live performances in music. Big date night energy.

title: Disclosure Live at The Eastern
location: The Eastern, 800 Old Flat Shoals Rd SE, Atlanta
description: British electronic duo Disclosure perform two nights at The Eastern (May 1 & 2). Live showcase of their house music hits — 'Latch,' 'You Know How to Love Me,' 'Motordrome' set. Intimate venue, incredible sound system. Ideal for couples who love to dance, Electronic music, or want a club-style date night without the club chaos.

title: Atlanta Film Festival 2026
description: The 50th Atlanta Film Festival screening 150+ films plus filmmaker panels, Creative Conference workshops, and special events including a Danielle Brooks Q&A on April 29. Great cultural date — catch a film together, grab dinner near Plaza Theatre in Virginia-Highland. Runs through May 3.

title: R.A.S Memorial Weekend ATL - 100% Reggae Afrobeats Soca
description: Memorial Weekend blowout featuring 100% reggae, Afrobeats, and Soca. One of Atlanta's premier Caribbean music events, 10PM-4AM at Underground Atlanta. Great for couples who love Caribbean culture and dancing. Memorial Weekend kickoff — book early! Note: this is the Saturday of Memorial Day weekend (May 23).

title: Caribbean Heat - Memorial Weekend Day Party
description: Island vibes day party with DJ Reese spinning Caribbean hits. Outdoor rooftop/atmosphere at Rose and Rye. Memorial Day weekend, 4-10PM — perfect afternoon date. Come for the island energy, stay for the vibes. Great for couples wanting a taste of the islands without leaving Atlanta.

title: Springfest at Round Trip Brewing Co.
location: Round Trip Brewing Co., East Cobb
description: German-inspired spring beer festival at Round Trip Brewing Co.'s East Cobb location. Craft beers, outdoor patio vibes, live music in the evening, and food trucks. Great for couples who enjoy craft beer, outdoor hangouts, and local brewery culture. Late spring date that's budget-friendly and fun.
